title: The new update of Gant-view is terrible
excerpt: I need to hear from everyone in this forum about what you think of the latest update of Monday when it comes to Gantt-view. The timelines per phase have become incredibly thick and oversized. How do you all experience th…

posts.author: NiklasLofgren (Niklas)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to hear from everyone in this forum about what you think of the latest update of Monday when it comes to Gantt-view. The timelines per phase have become incredibly thick and oversized. How do you all experience this? Does anyone here have tips on how to reduce the lines/bars?

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml: Same experience in our company too - for some of our staff with smaller screens they can barely fit anything in view. Why did they have to make the bars taller? If anything they need to fix how the item names don’t even fit in left hand list.

posts.author: slllslllslll (No)
posts.cookedHtml: I am no longer able to use the Gantt view for my weekly status updates, as it is impossible to zoom out far enough to fit my timeline vertically on the screen.
